tools.name: scan_mcp_server
tools.description: Run a full MCPCheckup scan against a remote MCP server: handshake, protocol version, tool/resource/prompt inventory, security heuristics, network/TLS posture, and license info.

tools.name: create_scorecard
tools.description: Scan a remote MCP server and return a shareable scorecard: security score (0-100), letter grade, a public scorecard page URL, and an Open Graph image URL for embedding or social sharing.
